title: geranium penicillatum
intro: Geranium penicillatum, also known as the wood cranesbill, is a perennial plant species belonging to the geranium family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Geranium penicillatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
